actor_actions: Observe the product list on page load
expected_observables: A list of product entries is visible
Each product entry shows an image, a title, and a price
state_effects: UI displays product entries with image, title and price
constraints: This behavior only asserts visibility of image, title, and price for each product

source_evidence.quote: When the page loads, the user can see a list of products, each with an image, title, and price.

expected_observables: Each product 'li' element has the attribute draggable set to 'true'
state_effects: Product list items are marked as draggable in the DOM
constraints: Only the presence of the 'draggable' attribute is asserted (value must be 'true')

source_evidence.quote: The product items are represented as 'li' elements with the attribute 'draggable' set to 'true'.

preconditions: A draggable product item is available
actor_actions: Initiate a drag (dragstart) on a product 'li' element
expected_observables: The drag event's transfer data contains the product's title and price
state_effects: DataTransfer payload includes title and price for the dragged product
constraints: Only the product title and price are required to be captured in the drag payload

source_evidence.quote: When the user drags a product item (li element) from the product list, the system should initiate a drag event, capturing the product's title and price for transfer.

preconditions: A drag event carrying a product title and price is in progress
actor_actions: Drop the dragged product into the designated drop area (shopping cart)
expected_observables: The cart area contains an entry showing the product title, its quantity, and its price
state_effects: Cart UI is updated to include a line item with title, quantity and price
constraints: This behavior asserts that the cart displays title, quantity and price after a drop

source_evidence.quote: Upon dropping a product into the shopping cart, the system adds the product to the cart and displays the product title, quantity, and price in the cart area.

preconditions: A product entry already exists in the cart with quantity >= 1
actor_actions: Drop the same product into the cart again
expected_observables: The product's quantity shown in the cart increments (increases by 1) rather than creating a duplicate line
state_effects: Cart state reflects incremented quantity for the existing product line
constraints: Quantity must increase rather than adding a separate line for the same product

source_evidence.quote: If the user drops the same product into the cart multiple times, the system increments the quantity of that product in the cart.

preconditions: One or more products are present in the cart
actor_actions: Add additional products to the cart (via drop or other supported means)
expected_observables: A total cost is shown at the bottom of the cart area formatted with a currency symbol and two decimal places
The displayed total updates as items are added
state_effects: Cart total equals the sum of (price * quantity) for all cart line items and is reflected in the UI
constraints: Total must use an appropriate currency symbol and two decimal places

source_evidence.quote: The system calculates the total cost of all products in the cart and displays it at the bottom of the cart area, formatted with the appropriate currency symbol and two decimal places.
